SEARCH
程序包 login

类 AccountInfoReader

java.lang.Object
login.AccountInfoReader
所有已实现的接口:
LoginCheck
public class AccountInfoReader extends Object implements LoginCheck
The AccountInfoReader class implements the LoginCheck interface and is responsible for reading and managing account information from a structured file system. It provides functionalities to authenticate users, load user-specific data such as accounts, tasks, and other related information.

    • authenticate

      public boolean authenticate(String email, String password)
      从接口复制的说明: LoginCheck
      Authenticate boolean.
      指定者:
      authenticate 在接口中 LoginCheck
      参数:
      email - the email
      password - the password
      返回:
      the boolean

    • parentLoader

      public Parent parentLoader(String email)
      Loads a Parent object with associated accounts, tasks, and kids list based on the email provided.
      参数:
      email - the email address to load the parent information
      返回:
      the loaded Parent object or null if an error occurs

    • kidLoader

      public Kid kidLoader(String email)
      Loads a Kid object with associated accounts and tasks based on the email provided.
      参数:
      email - the email address to load the kid information
      返回:
      the loaded Kid object or null if an error occurs

    • accountListLoader

      public ArrayList<Account> accountListLoader(String emailPath)
      Loads a list of Account objects associated with the given email.
      参数:
      emailPath - the path to the email directory containing account files
      返回:
      a list of Account objects

      public List<String> loadKidsName(String email)
      Loads the names of kids associated with a given parent's email.
      参数:

      返回:
      a list of kids' names

      Reads specific user information from a file.

      the data string
